prompt: Vertical badge-style portrait, pure black background, deep tech aesthetic. East Asian female, early thirties, face sharp and calm, eyes slightly upturned, as if staring at some deep truth beyond the frame — a silent insight. Black hair neatly pulled back into a low bun, with a loose strand of hair faintly appearing like data threads in the blue rim light. No glasses, eyes are the absolute focus: a faint cyan-blue bio-fluorescence glows inside the dark iris, suggesting deep cognition and insight. Clothing: A neatly tailored midnight blue high-collared long coat, with geometric seam lines faintly visible on the fabric like circuit traces; a matte texture with a subtle iridescent sheen. Simple dark undergarment. No accessories except for a minimalist geometric brooch at the neckline in the shape of a micro-prism. The figure is encased in an asymmetrical metal frame: brushed dark titanium texture, beveled edges, with precise wear textures on the surface, embedded with faint pulsing cyan light lines. Diamond/prism decorative elements at the top and bottom of the frame. Background: A giant glowing deep blue prism suspended behind the figure, decomposing an invisible beam of light into fine cyan and purple spectral arcs surrounding the portrait. The outer layer consists of concentric thin rings with a subtle hexagonal grid texture, echoing neural network topology. Soft volumetric light diffuses from behind, creating an atmosphere of deep exploration. Lighting: Chiaroscuro — the right side of the face lit by cold cyan light (technology, clarity, logic), the left side hidden in deep shadow, retaining a faint warm undertone (humanity, curiosity, the warmth beneath rationality). Skin shows pore-level realistic texture, as if some inner energy glows slightly beneath the dermal layer. Text at the bottom of the badge "DS Agent", refined minimalist sans-serif metallic font, with a subtle gradient from deep blue to cyan, slightly recessed into the metal base plate. Art Style: Cinematic character concept, intellectual sci-fi, Dark Academia fused with Cyberpunk, high-end concept art, 8K, hyper-realistic, rich material rendering, volumetric lighting. 1:1, rounded rectangle.
